ulti_osci.name: Ultimate Oscillator
ulti_osci.comment: Ultimate Oscillator = ta.ultimate_oscillator(high, low, close, length=n)

close_roc.name: ROC of Close
close_roc.comment: Rate of Change của Close = ta.roc(close, length=n)

efficiency_ratio.name: Efficiency Ratio
efficiency_ratio.comment: ER = change / volatility; change = abs(close - close.shift(n)); volatility = sum(abs(close - close.shift(1)));

macd.name: MACD
macd.comment: Moving Average Convergence Divergence = ta.macd(close, fast=n, slow=n, signal=n)

macd_signal.name: MACD Signal
macd_signal.comment: Moving Average Convergence Divergence Signal = ta.macd(close, fast=n, slow=n, signal=n)

macd_hist.name: MACD Hist
macd_hist.comment: Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram = ta.macd(close, fast=n, slow=n, signal=n)

ppo.name: PPO
ppo.comment: Percentage Price Oscillator = ta.ppo(close, fast=n, slow=n, signal=n)

ppo_signal.name: PPO Signal
ppo_signal.comment: Percentage Price Oscillator Signal = ta.ppo(close, fast=n, slow=n, signal=n)

ppo_hist.name: PPO Hist
ppo_hist.comment: Percentage Price Oscillator Histogram = ta.ppo(close, fast=n, slow=n, signal=n)
